title: pleopeltis decurrens
intro: Pleopeltis decurrens, also known as the creeping polypody or running polypody, is a type of epiphytic fern native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pleopeltis decurrens include the potential treatment of various ailments such as fever, wounds, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Pleopeltis decurrens can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
